title: St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly
tagline: St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly (also known as Known as the 'Sanctuary of Fatima' of South India and the 'Velankanni' of South Kerala,Thumpolypally) in Kerala, India, is a Catholic pilgrimage church named after Saint Thomas the Apostle, and dedicated to the Immaculate Conception of the mother of Jesus. It is located in the Ambalappuzha taluk of Alappuzha district within the Roman Catholic Diocese of Alleppey. Its parish is one of the largest in the diocese and in the state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Thumpoly
topPlaces.description: Thumpoly is coastal town in the Alappuzha District and is a well-known Christian marian pilgrimage shrine of Kerala. Thumpoly is a coastal town in Alappuzha district, India, and is a well-known Christian Marian pilgrimage shrine of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Aryad
topPlaces.description: Aryad is one of the panchayaths in Alappuzha district in the Kerala state of southern India. It is divided into two parts: Aryad North and Aryad South.

topPlaces.name: Pathirappally
topPlaces.description: Pathirappally is a coastal village in Alleppey District, Kerala state, India. It lies along the new coastal road, about 5 km from the town of Alleppey.

topPlaces.name: Komalapuram
topPlaces.description: Komalapuram is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is part of Aryad panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Revi Karunakaran Memorial Museum
topPlaces.description: The Revi Karunakaran Museum The Revi Karunakaran Memorial Museum is a privately owned museum located in Alappuzha, Kerala, in southern India. It is named in memory of Revi Karunakaran.

topPlaces.name: Aryad South
topPlaces.description: Aryad South is a village in Alappuzha district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Jain temple, Alappuzha
topPlaces.description: The Jain Temple in Alleppey is a place of worship for Jains in the southern Indian state of Kerala. It was important in the growth of Jainism in South India.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Aizawl
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Aizawl (Latin: Aizavlen(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Aizawl in the ecclesiastical province of Shillong in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly?
faq.a: Stays in St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Thomas Church, Thumpoly?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thumpoly, Aryad, Pathirappally, Komalapuram, Revi Karunakaran Memorial Museum.
